_meta.title: Proactive AI nudge — dunning suggestion
_meta.description: Unsolicited chat.postMessage to the rep who owns an aging invoice. Triggered by a scheduled background job that scans open invoices past a DSO threshold. Includes an embedded aging chart and one-click action buttons.
_meta.rca_endpoint: SOQL on Invoice + Payment; action triggers early-pay discount credit memo

elements.text: :sparkles: *RevFlow AI* — proactive nudge  ·  Apr 16, 2026 at 9:03 AM

text.text: Stark Industries owes *$27,410.00* — now *45 days past due*. Their typical days-to-pay is *22* — this is 2× their norm and the first time in 18 months they've crossed 30 days.

blocks.alt_text: AR aging: Current $184k, 1-30 days $62k, 31-60 $34k, 61-90 $18k, 90+ $9k. $27k at risk in 60+ bucket.

text.text: :bulb:  *What usually works for accounts like this:*

elements.text: — recovered 73% of balance within 10 days on 18 similar cases this FY.
Polite reminder with CC to AP
— Stark's AP contact (Tony L.) typically responds within 48h.
— reserved; use only after 60 days, damages relationship.
Not helpful? <https://revflow.app/settings/nudges|Turn off proactive nudges> · <https://revflow.app/settings/thresholds|Adjust thresholds>
